transitionWave.signature: (cwd: string, milestoneId: string, setId: string, waveId: string, status: string) => Promise<void>
transitionWave.description: Transition a wave's status with validation, lock protection, and atomic write

transitionJob.signature: (cwd: string, milestoneId: string, setId: string, waveId: string, jobId: string, status: string) => Promise<void>
transitionJob.description: Transition a job's status with validation, lock protection, and atomic write

detectIndependentWaves.description: Groups waves into parallelizable batches using DAG BFS level analysis

SetStatus.description: Updated Zod enum with past-tense status values -- needed for consistent status references in wave/job transitions

SET_TRANSITIONS.signature: { pending: ['discussed', 'planned'], discussed: ['planned'], planned: ['executed'], executed: ['complete'], complete: ['merged'], merged: [] }
SET_TRANSITIONS.description: Updated transition map -- wave/job transitions must align with the renamed set-level transitions

git-serialization.description: All git commit operations during parallel wave execution must be serialized through a lock to prevent index corruption

wave-ordering-respected.description: Dependent waves (those with edges in the DAG) must not execute until their dependencies complete

transition-functions-exported.description: transitionWave() and transitionJob() must be exported from state-machine.cjs and callable by rapid-tools.cjs CLI
